title: move arena-server to korczewski, clean up stale CI + CLAUDE.md
description:
## Summary
- Move arena-server from mentolder to korczewski: overlay, nodeAffinity patch, task guards, ARENA_WS_URL in both environments
- Fix arena-bootstrap Job DB host from hardcoded `shared-db.workspace.svc.cluster.local` to `shared-db` (namespace-agnostic short name — required for korczewski's `workspace-korczewski` namespace)
- Delete dead `.github/workflows/tracking.yml` (references `scripts/tracking/` which was never created; real drain is the in-cluster `tracking-import` CronJob)
- CLAUDE.md audit: add Arena/Brainstorm/Coaching command sections, `feature:arena` to fan-out list, CI section now covers `arena-server` + proto-drift guard + `build-website*` + `dev-auto-deploy` + `dev-smoke`

## Post-merge steps
1. `task env:generate ENV=korczewski && task env:seal ENV=korczewski` — ensure `arena_db_url`/`arena_db_password` point to korczewski shared-db
2. `task arena:deploy ENV=korczewski` — bootstrap schema + roll arena-server
3. Optionally `task arena:teardown ENV=mentolder` — remove old mentolder arena resources

## Test plan
- [x] `task workspace:validate` — manifests valid
- [x] `task test:all` — all offline tests pass
- [ ] Post-merge: `task arena:status ENV=korczewski` confirms pod running
- [ ] Post-merge: `https://web.korczewski.de/portal/arena` connects to `arena-ws.korczewski.de`
- [ ] Post-merge: `https://web.mentolder.de/portal/arena` connects cross-cluster to `arena-ws.korczewski.de`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
